primary_diagnosis:
Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma(DLBCL) (Activated B-cell type),
Stage II BE, ID 03/2024
- Nodal involvement: cervical, supraclavicular; Extralymphatic involvement: Mass in
paranasal sinuses
- B symptoms: Night sweats, Fever
- Risk factors: extranodal involvement
question: Indication for CAR-T cell therapy in early relapse?
tumor_board_decision:
Evaluate re-biopsy. If DLBCL confirmed, CAR-T indication 2nd line (Axicel). Bridging
with radiation therapy. Molecular tumor board indication.
